examples: You look like a nice upstanding young man.
Thank you to his own parents for, well, bringing him up to be an upstanding citizen.
But not every polluter has upstanding Norwegians investing in it, or holds its AGM in London.
"Most file-sharing programs aren't the most upstanding citizens of the computing world, " Pegorraro says.
Legitimate companies may not be perfect, but most take actions to be upstanding corporate citizens.
